text.title: Renovate Auto-Merge + AI Handoff Core Rules
text.summary: Six testable rules pinning when Renovate auto-merges, when bumps escalate to a coding agent, and when the methodology does not apply.

rule.statement: Renovate config MUST include `packageRules` that auto-merge patch + minor (on packages with currentVersion not starting with 0) AND label major bumps with `agent-fixable` (automerge=false).

rationale.source: Mend Renovate docs + GitHub April 2026 changelog

rule.rationale: Renovate's deterministic merge succeeds on >90% of patch bumps; agents are reserved for breaking 10%.

rule.statement: Auto-merge MUST be gated on Mend Merge-Confidence == "high" AND platformAutomerge=true so GitHub waits for required checks before merging.
rule.rationale: Merge-Confidence eliminates the silent-regression class on patch bumps.

rule.statement: Packages with currentVersion matching `/^0/` MUST treat minor bumps as breaking — label `agent-fixable`, do not auto-merge.
rule.rationale: 0.x semver allows breaking changes on minor; Renovate honours this only with an explicit rule.

rule.statement: `vulnerabilityAlerts` block MUST set labels=[agent-fixable, security] and automerge=false so a coding agent rewrites call-sites before merge.
rule.rationale: Security patches often introduce breaking API changes; agent rewrite is required, not optional.

rule.statement: Repo MUST ship `.github/workflows/dependabot-agent-handoff.yml` that listens for `pull_request.labeled` events and assigns the PR to a coding agent (`copilot-swe-agent` / Claude / Codex / Devin).
rule.rationale: Without the handoff workflow the `agent-fixable` label is decoration; the agent only picks up assigned PRs.

rule.statement: Major bumps MUST NEVER auto-merge — even with Merge-Confidence == "high" — because call-site rewrites are out of Renovate's scope.
rule.rationale: Major auto-merge regularly breaks call-sites that no human or agent reviewed.

rule.statement: If repo pins all versions exactly (no auto-update policy) OR has no CI OR is a vendored mirror, STOP.
rule.rationale: Skip applies only to repos where Renovate has no role.
